creator: o.kryvulia@flex-it.com.ua
text:
I am using 9.1-STABLE with kde 4.8.4 on my laptop. I have configured
suspend action on lid close in my kde preferences, but when I close lid
nothing happens. If I set hw.acpi.lid_switch_state=S3 then my laptop
suspended, but my kde session is not locked.

How-To-Repeat: Set hw.acpi.lid_switch_state=NONE, configure suspend action on lid close
in kde preferences and close a lid - system not suspended.
